title: MUSEUM BASEMENT ARCHIVAL / INCINERATION
body:
After the security director escaped into the void, Monogon has become exceedingly paranoid about infosec.

They’ve tasked me with simply throwing away discarded museum parts into the incinerator and cataloging info pull requests.

I think anyone that requests info is immediately investigated and possibly terminated…

This paranoia is too much.
I’m not sure how much longer I can swing this.

-Chris
